descriptionShort: Maine Sunday Telegram article mentioning recruitment of B.C. and other freshmen hockey players including Czenczek.
descriptionLong: A Maine Sunday Telegram article from January 1985 discussing freshmen hockey recruitment. Walsh brought in several new players from British Columbia—Dave Wensley, Stan Czenczek, and Dave Nonis—along with Todd Studnicka from Ontario and Dewey Wahlin from Minnesota. The article notes Nonis and Wahlin as top scorers and Czenczek as a solid defenseman.
